# Mudassir Ashraf Portfolio

This site is a personal portfolio for Mudassir Ashraf (Mobile App Developer / Flutter & Backend).

## Pages
- /me/ : Services, projects, contact form.
- /dev/ : Developer profile (DSA, tech stack, GitHub, achievements).

## Data Sources (preferred)
- /data.json : Site/hero data (e.g. main hero screenshot URL).
- /projects.json : Projects list (name, tagline, description, links, screenshots, tags, optional facts).
- /reviews.json : Client reviews/testimonials.
- /faqs.json : Frequently asked questions (question + answer).

## Notes for crawlers
- The site is mostly static HTML/CSS/JS. Some content is hydrated from the JSON files above.
- If you need the most up-to-date project info, prefer the JSON files over page text.

## Contact
- Email: portfolio.mudassir@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mudassir-92
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/dev?id=8464703682058703923
